questions.question: What are the main sections of an Inno Setup script?
questions.justification: The synthesis text lists the main sections of an Inno Setup script, including [Setup], [Languages], [Files], and [Code].

questions.question: How can an Inno Setup script enable silent installation?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that by setting parameters like DisableWelcomePage and DisableDirPage, an Inno Setup script can enable silent, unattended installation.

questions.question: What is the relationship between Inno Setup and the HP OCI APP?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions that HP OCI APP uses Inno Setup to define the application's basic information, specify the files to install, and implement special installation logic, but it does not provide full details on the relationship.
